# Digital Product Solutions

> Kerala's trusted software development, mobile app, SEO & WhatsApp automation agency based in Trivandrum. We help 20+ businesses across Kerala grow online.

Digital Product Solutions is a registered MSME IT company based in Thiruvananthapuram (Trivandrum), Kerala, India. We are a full-service technology and digital marketing agency serving businesses across Kerala including Kochi, Kollam, Kozhikode, Kannur, Palakkad, and Kottayam.

## Services

- **Custom Software Development**: Web applications, dashboards, booking systems, and business platforms built for Kerala businesses. Starting ₹15,000.
- **Mobile App Development**: Android and iOS apps for restaurants, shops, clinics, and delivery services. Starting ₹25,000.
- **SEO Services**: Technical SEO, local SEO, and content SEO to rank on Google for Kerala searches. Starting ₹5,000/month.
- **Social Media Management**: Instagram, Facebook, and WhatsApp marketing. Starting ₹3,000/month.
- **WhatsApp Business Automation**: Automated WhatsApp replies, lead qualification bots, and order tracking systems. Starting ₹10,000.
- **AI-Powered Solutions**: Custom AI chatbots, RAG systems, and automation using large language models. Starting ₹12,000.
- **Google Ads Management**: PPC campaign management for Kerala businesses.
- **Odoo ERP Development**: Business management software for Kerala manufacturers and retailers.

## Industries Served

Hospitals & Clinics, Hotels & Resorts, Restaurants, E-commerce, Real Estate & Builders, Schools & Education, Manufacturing.
